subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-08-08
subcodes.first_line: These dreadful events are as warnings on the part of God:--so that they may quicken the people
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for peace and unity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
